name: Govan Ontbloot
overview: This series features a wide range of stories that highlight the richness of South Africa's social landscape: from the dreams of an Afrikaner cultural community in Kleinfontein outside Pretoria, to the world of Afrikaans swingers and Tokkie van Wyk's New Life Centre, where addicts come for healing through the only medicine Tokkie believes works – the gospel.

trailers.title: Amptelike Lokprent: Govan Ontbloot | S1 | Vanaf 30 Julie 2025 | kykNET
